notableEvents.label: Matt Shaw plunked
notableEvents.detail: Matt Shaw hit by pitch. Seiya Suzuki to 3rd. Ian Happ to 2nd.

notableEvents.label: Pickoff
notableEvents.detail: Mets challenged (tag play), call on the field was overturned: pitcher Tobias Myers picks off Matt Shaw at 1st on throw to first baseman Mark Vientos.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, pitcher Hoby Milner to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. A.J. Ewing out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Eric Wagaman pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Eric Wagaman flies out to left fielder Ian Happ.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Seiya Suzuki singles on a sharp line drive to left fielder Eric Wagaman. Seiya Suzuki to 2nd. Seiya Suzuki advances to 2nd, on a fielding error by left fielder Eric Wagaman.

notableEvents.label: Marcus Semien GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Marcus Semien grounds into a double play, pitcher Hoby Milner to second baseman Nico Hoerner to first baseman Michael Busch. A.J. Ewing out at 2nd. Marcus Semien out at 1st.
